introSection: Ultra Twister (Japanese: ウルトラツイスター) is a steel pipeline roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is the only Ultra Twister installation to have a dive loop to change direction, as opposed to a tilting section of track.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and green supports. The ride used to feature dark blue supports.

fullText:
Ultra Twister (Japanese: ウルトラツイスター) is a steel pipeline roller coaster located at Rusutsu Resort in Rusutsu, Abuta, Shiribeshi, Hokkaido, Japan. It is the only Ultra Twister installation to have a dive loop to change direction, as opposed to a tilting section of track.



Yellow track and green supports. The ride used to feature dark blue supports.
